<h2 data-start=3D"18154" data-end=3D"18196">How to add your address &amp; p=
hone (quick)</h2>
<ul data-start=3D"18197" data-end=3D"18433">
<li data-start=3D"18197" data-end=3D"18271">
<p data-start=3D"18199" data-end=3D"18271">In the HTML, replace <strong dat=
a-start=3D"18220" data-end=3D"18250">REPLACE_WITH_ADDRESS_LATER</strong> an=
d <strong data-start=3D"18255" data-end=3D"18270">REPLACE_ZIP</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"18272" data-end=3D"18333">
<p data-start=3D"18274" data-end=3D"18333">Replace <strong data-start=3D"18=
282" data-end=3D"18310">REPLACE_WITH_PHONE_LATER</strong> everywhere it app=
ears.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"18334" data-end=3D"18433">
<p data-start=3D"18336" data-end=3D"18433">In the JSON=E2=80=91LD (LocalBus=
iness) at the top, update <code data-start=3D"18386" data-end=3D"18397">tel=
ephone</code>, <code data-start=3D"18399" data-end=3D"18414">streetAddress<=
/code>, and <code data-start=3D"18420" data-end=3D"18432">postalCode</code>=
.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-start=3D"18435" data-end=3D"18472">Fast deployment options (pick o=
ne)</h2>
<ol data-start=3D"18473" data-end=3D"18733">
<li data-start=3D"18473" data-end=3D"18585">
<p data-start=3D"18476" data-end=3D"18585"><strong data-start=3D"18476" dat=
a-end=3D"18487">Netlify</strong>: Drag=E2=80=91and=E2=80=91drop <code data-=

" data-end=3D"18548">robots.txt</code>) into Netlify =E2=86=92 set custom d=
omain.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"18586" data-end=3D"18647">
<p data-start=3D"18589" data-end=3D"18647"><strong data-start=3D"18589" dat=
a-end=3D"18599">Vercel</strong>: Create a new project, add the files, deplo=

</li>

8726" data-end=3D"18732">main</code>.</p>
</li>
</ol>

and give you a one=E2=80=91click deploy setup (Netlify/Vercel) with your do=
main.</p>

<p data-start=3D"283" data-end=3D"375">=E2=9C=85 Yes, you can absolutely us=
e <strong data-start=3D"313" data-end=3D"336">GoDaddy for hosting</strong>.=
 You=E2=80=99ll have two main options there:</p>
<ol data-start=3D"377" data-end=3D"707">
<li data-start=3D"377" data-end=3D"555">
<p data-start=3D"380" data-end=3D"555"><strong data-start=3D"380" data-end=
=3D"416">GoDaddy Website Hosting (cPanel)</strong> =E2=80=93 you upload you=
r <code data-start=3D"435" data-end=3D"447">index.html</code>, <code data-s=
tart=3D"449" data-end=3D"461">robots.txt</code>, and <code data-start=3D"46=
7" data-end=3D"480">sitemap.xml</code> directly. This works well for static=
 sites like the one I built for you.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"556" data-end=3D"707">
<p data-start=3D"559" data-end=3D"707"><strong data-start=3D"559" data-end=
=3D"586">GoDaddy Website Builder</strong> =E2=80=93 not as flexible for cus=
tom code, so you=E2=80=99d need to embed custom HTML. I=E2=80=99d recommend=
 the regular hosting plan instead.</p>
</li>
</ol>

usingsolutions.com</code>), you=E2=80=99ll just upload the files, and you=
=E2=80=99ll be live.</p>

mp; global CDN. Great for static websites, smooth scaling. Paid ~$20/month =
if needed.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"603" data-end=3D"716">
<p data-start=3D"605" data-end=3D"716"><strong data-start=3D"605" data-end=
=3D"621">GitHub Pages</strong> =E2=80=93 Free, but requires linking to a Gi=
tHub repo. Not as user-friendly for non-technical users.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<h3 data-start=3D"723" data-end=3D"789">=E2=9A=A1 <strong data-start=3D"729=
" data-end=3D"789">Traditional Low-Cost Hosting (good for small businesses)=
</strong></h3>
<ul data-start=3D"790" data-end=3D"1116">

=3D"805">Hostinger</strong> =E2=80=93 Very cheap (~$2=E2=80=934/month annua=
l plan). Includes free domain, SSL, and email. Easy for beginners.</p>
</li>

<p data-start=3D"908" data-end=3D"1008"><strong data-start=3D"908" data-end=
=3D"922">SiteGround</strong> =E2=80=93 Excellent support and performance, ~=

nd=3D"1023">Bluehost</strong> =E2=80=93 ~$3=E2=80=936/month, includes free =
domain for the first year. Good balance of features and cost.</p>

4/month, very scalable, managed cloud. Overkill for your site unless you ex=

werful, but requires technical management. Not recommended unless you=E2=80=
=99re scaling nationally.</p>

6 class=3D"sr-only">Website Creator said:</h6><div class=3D"text-base my-au=
to mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:--spacing(4)] @[37rem]:[--thread-conten=
t-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-=
(--thread-content-margin)"><div class=3D"[--thread-content-max-width:32rem]=
 @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max=

div data-message-author-role=3D"assistant" data-message-id=3D"e18f12cd-12a0=
-4e85-9f6f-743a351a063c" dir=3D"auto" class=3D"min-h-8 text-message relativ=
e flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-no=
rmal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug=3D"gpt-5"><div cla=
ss=3D"flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class=3D=
"markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words light markdown-new-sty=
ling"><p data-start=3D"0" data-end=3D"139">Perfect choice =E2=9C=85 Netlify=
 is a great place to start because it=E2=80=99s free (unless you upgrade la=
ter) and <strong data-start=3D"100" data-end=3D"121">very SEO-friendly</str=
ong> out of the box.</p>
<p data-start=3D"141" data-end=3D"261">=F0=9F=91=89 <strong data-start=3D"1=
44" data-end=3D"166">=E2=80=9CManaging deploys=E2=80=9D</strong> just means=
 deciding <strong data-start=3D"187" data-end=3D"236">how you put your upda=
ted website files online</strong> when you make changes:</p>
<ol data-start=3D"263" data-end=3D"881">
<li data-start=3D"263" data-end=3D"571">
<p data-start=3D"266" data-end=3D"298"><strong data-start=3D"266" data-end=
=3D"296">Drag &amp; Drop (super simple)</strong></p>
<ul data-start=3D"302" data-end=3D"571">
<li data-start=3D"302" data-end=3D"327">
<p data-start=3D"304" data-end=3D"327">You log into Netlify.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"331" data-end=3D"412">
<p data-start=3D"333" data-end=3D"412">Drag your <code data-start=3D"343" d=
ata-end=3D"355">index.html</code>, <code data-start=3D"357" data-end=3D"369=
">robots.txt</code>, and <code data-start=3D"375" data-end=3D"388">sitemap.=
xml</code> into their dashboard.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"416" data-end=3D"489">
<p data-start=3D"418" data-end=3D"489">Netlify instantly publishes your sit=
e with SSL (the =E2=80=9Chttps://=E2=80=9D lock).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"493" data-end=3D"571">
<p data-start=3D"495" data-end=3D"571">If you update your site later, you j=
ust drag &amp; drop the new file(s) again.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"573" data-end=3D"881">
<p data-start=3D"576" data-end=3D"613"><strong data-start=3D"576" data-end=
=3D"611">Connected to GitHub (automatic)</strong></p>
<ul data-start=3D"617" data-end=3D"881">
<li data-start=3D"617" data-end=3D"706">
<p data-start=3D"619" data-end=3D"706">If your site files live in GitHub (o=
r GitLab/Bitbucket), Netlify can watch that repo.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"710" data-end=3D"804">
<p data-start=3D"712" data-end=3D"804">Anytime you change something and pus=
h to GitHub, Netlify <strong data-start=3D"769" data-end=3D"785">auto-deplo=
ys</strong> the new version.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"808" data-end=3D"881">
<p data-start=3D"810" data-end=3D"881">This is more =E2=80=9Chands-off=E2=
=80=9D once it=E2=80=99s set up, but requires using GitHub.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"883" data-end=3D"886">
<p data-start=3D"888" data-end=3D"1044">For <strong data-start=3D"892" data=
-end=3D"910">your situation</strong>, I=E2=80=99d recommend starting with <=
strong data-start=3D"940" data-end=3D"966">Option 1 (drag &amp; drop)</stro=
ng> since it=E2=80=99s easiest. You can always switch to auto-deploy later =
if you want.</p>
<p data-start=3D"1046" data-end=3D"1122">=F0=9F=92=A1 Once you drag &amp; d=
rop, Netlify will give you a temporary subdomain like:</p>

<p data-start=3D"306" data-end=3D"374"><strong data-start=3D"306" data-end=
=3D"337">Connect your GoDaddy domain</strong> (e.g. devinehousingsolutions.=
com).</p>
<ul data-start=3D"378" data-end=3D"625">
<li data-start=3D"378" data-end=3D"440">
<p data-start=3D"380" data-end=3D"440">Inside Netlify=E2=80=99s dashboard, =
you=E2=80=99ll add your custom domain.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"444" data-end=3D"550">
<p data-start=3D"446" data-end=3D"550">Then, in GoDaddy=E2=80=99s DNS setti=
ngs, you=E2=80=99ll update a couple of records (usually an <code data-start=
=3D"525" data-end=3D"528">A</code> record or <code data-start=3D"539" data-=
end=3D"546">CNAME</code>).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"554" data-end=3D"625">
<p data-start=3D"556" data-end=3D"625">This makes your GoDaddy domain point=
 directly to your Netlify site.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start=3D"627" data-end=3D"760">So yes, you=E2=80=99ll <strong data-=
start=3D"642" data-end=3D"673">keep your domain at GoDaddy</strong>, but th=
e actual website hosting will be handled by Netlify (fast, free, and secure=
).</p>
<hr data-start=3D"762" data-end=3D"765">
<p data-start=3D"767" data-end=3D"907">=E2=9C=85 I=E2=80=99ll package your =
full site (<code data-start=3D"798" data-end=3D"810">index.html</code>, <co=
de data-start=3D"812" data-end=3D"824">robots.txt</code>, and <code data-st=
art=3D"830" data-end=3D"843">sitemap.xml</code>) into a <strong data-start=
=3D"852" data-end=3D"859">ZIP</strong> so you can just <strong data-start=
=3D"876" data-end=3D"891">drag &amp; drop</strong> into Netlify.</p>
<p data-start=3D"909" data-end=3D"1076" data-is-last-node=3D"" data-is-only=
-node=3D"">Do you want me to also include a <strong data-start=3D"942" data=

<h3 data-start=3D"1117" data-end=3D"1139">3. Back to Netlify</h3>
<ul data-start=3D"1140" data-end=3D"1309">
<li data-start=3D"1140" data-end=3D"1235">
<p data-start=3D"1142" data-end=3D"1235">After saving those records in GoDa=
ddy, return to Netlify and click <strong data-start=3D"1209" data-end=3D"12=
32">Verify DNS settings</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1236" data-end=3D"1309">
<p data-start=3D"1238" data-end=3D"1309">Once verified, Netlify will issue =
a free <strong data-start=3D"1279" data-end=3D"1298">SSL certificate</stron=
g> (HTTPS).</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"1311" data-end=3D"1314">
<h3 data-start=3D"1316" data-end=3D"1347">4. Make one version primary</h3>
<ul data-start=3D"1348" data-end=3D"1628">
<li data-start=3D"1348" data-end=3D"1511">
<p data-start=3D"1350" data-end=3D"1403">Choose whether you want visitors t=
o always land on:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"1406" data-end=3D"1511">
<li data-start=3D"1406" data-end=3D"1457">
<p data-start=3D"1408" data-end=3D"1457"><code data-start=3D"1408" data-end=
=3D"1444">https://devinehousingsolutions.com</code> (apex), or</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1460" data-end=3D"1511">
<p data-start=3D"1462" data-end=3D"1511"><code data-start=3D"1462" data-end=
=3D"1502">https://www.devinehousingsolutions.com</code> (www).</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1512" data-end=3D"1562">
<p data-start=3D"1514" data-end=3D"1562">Set that as the <strong data-start=
=3D"1530" data-end=3D"1548">Primary Domain</strong> in Netlify.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1563" data-end=3D"1628">
<p data-start=3D"1565" data-end=3D"1628">Netlify will auto-redirect the oth=
er version to your primary.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"1630" data-end=3D"1633">
<p data-start=3D"1635" data-end=3D"1725">=E2=9C=85 After this, typing <stro=
ng data-start=3D"1656" data-end=3D"1679">your GoDaddy domain</strong> in an=
y browser will load your Netlify site.</p>

=E2=9C=85 =E2=80=94 you=E2=80=99ll use <strong data-start=3D"19" data-end=
=3D"48">the exact same site files</strong> (<code data-start=3D"50" data-en=

onal host</strong>.</p>
<p data-start=3D"146" data-end=3D"247">The beauty of your site is that it=
=E2=80=99s a <strong data-start=3D"185" data-end=3D"200">static site</stron=
g> (pure HTML + CSS + a bit of JS). That means:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"249" data-end=3D"601">
<li data-start=3D"249" data-end=3D"300">
<p data-start=3D"251" data-end=3D"300">No special frameworks or backends ar=
e required.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"301" data-end=3D"516">
<p data-start=3D"303" data-end=3D"344">You can upload the same files anywhe=
re:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"347" data-end=3D"516">
<li data-start=3D"347" data-end=3D"398">
<p data-start=3D"349" data-end=3D"398"><strong data-start=3D"349" data-end=
=3D"359">Vercel</strong> =E2=86=92 drag &amp; drop or connect via GitHub.</=
p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"401" data-end=3D"431">
<p data-start=3D"403" data-end=3D"431"><strong data-start=3D"403" data-end=
=3D"414">Netlify</strong> =E2=86=92 drag &amp; drop.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"434" data-end=3D"516">
<p data-start=3D"436" data-end=3D"516"><strong data-start=3D"436" data-end=
=3D"472">GoDaddy / Hostinger / SiteGround</strong> =E2=86=92 upload to <cod=
e data-start=3D"485" data-end=3D"498">public_html</code> or root folder.</p=
>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"517" data-end=3D"601">
<p data-start=3D"519" data-end=3D"601">SEO files (<code data-start=3D"530" =
data-end=3D"542">robots.txt</code> + <code data-start=3D"545" data-end=3D"5=
58">sitemap.xml</code>) will work identically across all hosts.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start=3D"603" data-end=3D"711">So you only need <strong data-start=
=3D"620" data-end=3D"640">one set of files</strong>, and you can move them =
around whenever you switch hosting providers.</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"170" data-end=3D"210">=F0=9F=94=B9 How to deploy without =
Git on Vercel</h1>
<ol data-start=3D"211" data-end=3D"770">
<li data-start=3D"211" data-end=3D"267">
<p data-start=3D"214" data-end=3D"267">Log in at <a data-start=3D"224" data=
-end=3D"264" rel=3D"noopener" target=3D"_new" class=3D"decorated-link curso=
r-pointer">https://vercel.com<span aria-hidden=3D"true" class=3D"ms-0.5 inl=
ine-block align-middle leading-none"><svg width=3D"20" height=3D"20" viewBo=

ke-[0.75]"><path d=3D"M14.3349 13.3301V6.60645L5.47065 15.4707C5.21095 15.7=

vg></span></a>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"268" data-end=3D"320">
<p data-start=3D"271" data-end=3D"320">On your dashboard, click <strong dat=
a-start=3D"296" data-end=3D"317">Add New =E2=86=92 Project</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"321" data-end=3D"549">
<p data-start=3D"324" data-end=3D"409">On the next screen, scroll down past=
 the Git providers (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket).</p>
<ul data-start=3D"413" data-end=3D"549">
<li data-start=3D"413" data-end=3D"530">
<p data-start=3D"415" data-end=3D"530">You=E2=80=99ll see a small link that=
 says <strong data-start=3D"449" data-end=3D"483">=E2=80=9CDeploy a Project=
 without Git=E2=80=9D</strong> or <strong data-start=3D"487" data-end=3D"50=
8">=E2=80=9CImport manually=E2=80=9D</strong> (wording may vary).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"534" data-end=3D"549">
<p data-start=3D"536" data-end=3D"549">Click that.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"550" data-end=3D"675">
<p data-start=3D"553" data-end=3D"675">Now you=E2=80=99ll get an <strong da=
ta-start=3D"571" data-end=3D"585">upload box</strong>. Drag &amp; drop your=
 files (<code data-start=3D"611" data-end=3D"623">index.html</code>, <code =
data-start=3D"625" data-end=3D"637">robots.txt</code>, <code data-start=3D"=
639" data-end=3D"652">sitemap.xml</code>) or upload your ZIP.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"676" data-end=3D"770">
<p data-start=3D"679" data-end=3D"770">Vercel will instantly give you a liv=
e preview URL (e.g., <code data-start=3D"736" data-end=3D"766">https://your=
-site.vercel.app</code>).</p>
</li>
</ol>

=91=8D</p>
<p data-start=3D"55" data-end=3D"215">On Vercel, the <strong data-start=3D"=
70" data-end=3D"111">=E2=80=9CImport a Third-Party Git Repository=E2=80=9D<=
/strong> option is specifically for bringing in a site that already lives i=
n <strong data-start=3D"180" data-end=3D"212">GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket<=
/strong>.</p>
<p data-start=3D"217" data-end=3D"310">What you=E2=80=99re looking for is t=
he <strong data-start=3D"248" data-end=3D"265">manual upload</strong> optio=
n =E2=80=94 the little link that says either:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"312" data-end=3D"379">
<li data-start=3D"312" data-end=3D"350">
<p data-start=3D"314" data-end=3D"350"><strong data-start=3D"314" data-end=
=3D"348">=E2=80=9CDeploy a project without Git=E2=80=9D</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"351" data-end=3D"379">
<p data-start=3D"353" data-end=3D"379">or <strong data-start=3D"356" data-e=
nd=3D"377">=E2=80=9CImport manually=E2=80=9D</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start=3D"381" data-end=3D"484">It=E2=80=99s usually <strong data-st=
art=3D"394" data-end=3D"409">right below</strong> the Git provider options =
(GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket) on the same screen.</p>
<hr data-start=3D"486" data-end=3D"489">
<p data-start=3D"491" data-end=3D"529">=E2=9A=A1 If you don=E2=80=99t see t=
hat link at all:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"530" data-end=3D"813">
<li data-start=3D"530" data-end=3D"651">
<p data-start=3D"532" data-end=3D"651">Vercel might be hiding it in your ac=
count view (sometimes it only shows up after you=E2=80=99ve already created=
 one project).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"652" data-end=3D"813">
<p data-start=3D"654" data-end=3D"813">In that case, you can absolutely use=
 the <strong data-start=3D"695" data-end=3D"711">GitHub route</strong>: cre=
ate a free GitHub repo, upload your files, and connect it to Vercel (the st=
eps I gave earlier).</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"815" data-end=3D"818">
<p data-start=3D"820" data-end=3D"827">=E2=9C=85 So:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"828" data-end=3D"1047">
<li data-start=3D"828" data-end=3D"948">
<p data-start=3D"830" data-end=3D"948">If you only see <strong data-start=
=3D"846" data-end=3D"885">Import a Third-Party Git Repository</strong>, tha=
t means it wants you to connect via GitHub (or similar).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"949" data-end=3D"1047">
<p data-start=3D"951" data-end=3D"1047">If you=E2=80=99d rather skip GitHub=
, try scrolling down further for the <strong data-start=3D"1015" data-end=
=3D"1039">=E2=80=9CDeploy without Git=E2=80=9D</strong> link.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<p data-start=3D"389" data-end=3D"442">Do you see <code data-start=3D"400" =
data-end=3D"426">devine-housing-solutions</code> listed there?</p>

</li>
<li data-start=3D"443" data-end=3D"471">
<p data-start=3D"446" data-end=3D"471">Click the project name.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"472" data-end=3D"741">
<p data-start=3D"475" data-end=3D"534">Inside the project, you should see a=
 <strong data-start=3D"512" data-end=3D"531">Deployments tab</strong>.</p>
<ul data-start=3D"538" data-end=3D"741">
<li data-start=3D"538" data-end=3D"602">
<p data-start=3D"540" data-end=3D"602">If the upload worked, there will be =
at least one deployment.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"606" data-end=3D"656">
<p data-start=3D"608" data-end=3D"656">Each deployment has its own <code da=
ta-start=3D"636" data-end=3D"649">.vercel.app</code> URL.</p>
</li>

<li data-start=3D"742" data-end=3D"994">
<p data-start=3D"745" data-end=3D"832">If you don=E2=80=99t see any deploym=
ents =E2=86=92 the upload didn=E2=80=99t work, and you=E2=80=99ll need to e=
ither:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"836" data-end=3D"994">
<li data-start=3D"836" data-end=3D"917">
<p data-start=3D"838" data-end=3D"917">Try the <strong data-start=3D"846" d=
ata-end=3D"863">manual upload</strong> again (scroll to bottom =E2=86=92 =
=E2=80=9CDeploy without Git=E2=80=9D), OR</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"921" data-end=3D"994">
<p data-start=3D"923" data-end=3D"994">Connect via <strong data-start=3D"93=
5" data-end=3D"945">GitHub</strong> (upload files there, then import into V=
ercel).</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"996" data-end=3D"999">
<h3 data-start=3D"1001" data-end=3D"1043">=F0=9F=94=B9 Why you may not have=
 received a URL</h3>
<ul data-start=3D"1044" data-end=3D"1273">
<li data-start=3D"1044" data-end=3D"1117">
<p data-start=3D"1046" data-end=3D"1117">The files weren=E2=80=99t uploaded=
 (Vercel expects at least an <code data-start=3D"1101" data-end=3D"1113">in=
dex.html</code>).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1118" data-end=3D"1186">
<p data-start=3D"1120" data-end=3D"1186">The project wasn=E2=80=99t fully c=
reated (maybe it got stuck mid-setup).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1187" data-end=3D"1273">
<p data-start=3D"1189" data-end=3D"1273">You only clicked =E2=80=9CImport a=
 third-party Git repo=E2=80=9D but didn=E2=80=99t finish connecting one.</p=
>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"1275" data-end=3D"1278">
<p data-start=3D"1280" data-end=3D"1420">=F0=9F=91=89 Quick fix: Go back to=
 your <strong data-start=3D"1310" data-end=3D"1341">Vercel dashboard =E2=86=
=92 Projects</strong>.<br data-start=3D"1342" data-end=3D"1345">
Do you see your project (<code data-start=3D"1370" data-end=3D"1396">devine=
-housing-solutions</code>) listed there at all?</p>
<p data-start=3D"1422" data-end=3D"1584">If yes =E2=86=92 click it and chec=
k the Deployments tab for your <code data-start=3D"1479" data-end=3D"1492">=
.vercel.app</code> link.<br data-start=3D"1498" data-end=3D"1501">
If no =E2=86=92 we=E2=80=99ll need to retry either the <strong data-start=
=3D"1540" data-end=3D"1557">manual upload</strong> or the <strong data-star=
t=3D"1565" data-end=3D"1581">GitHub route</strong>.</p>

-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" tabindex=3D"-1" d=
ir=3D"auto" data-turn-id=3D"c2b4abe6-fbb5-471d-acab-2b20fc0a15bb" data-test=
id=3D"conversation-turn-46" data-scroll-anchor=3D"false" data-turn=3D"assis=
tant"><h6 class=3D"sr-only">Website Creator said:</h6><div class=3D"text-ba=
se my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:--spacing(4)] @[37rem]:[--threa=
d-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(=
16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class=3D"[--thread-content-max-widt=
h:32rem] @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-con=

up/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 =
flex-col agent-turn" tabindex=3D"-1"><div class=3D"flex max-w-full flex-col=
 grow"><div data-message-author-role=3D"assistant" data-message-id=3D"c2b4a=
be6-fbb5-471d-acab-2b20fc0a15bb" dir=3D"auto" class=3D"min-h-8 text-message=
 relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words white=
space-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug=3D"gpt-5">=
<div class=3D"flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div =
class=3D"markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words light markdown=
-new-styling"><p data-start=3D"0" data-end=3D"216">Ahh, that explains it =
=F0=9F=91=8C =E2=80=94 if your files were saved as <strong data-start=3D"55=
" data-end=3D"75"><code data-start=3D"57" data-end=3D"62">.md</code> (Markd=
own)</strong> instead of <strong data-start=3D"87" data-end=3D"116"><code d=
ata-start=3D"89" data-end=3D"96">.html</code> / <code data-start=3D"99" dat=
a-end=3D"105">.txt</code> / <code data-start=3D"108" data-end=3D"114">.xml<=
/code></strong>, Vercel won=E2=80=99t recognize them as a website, which is=
 why you didn=E2=80=99t get a live <code data-start=3D"195" data-end=3D"208=
">.vercel.app</code> link.</p>
<hr data-start=3D"218" data-end=3D"221">
<h3 data-start=3D"223" data-end=3D"249">=E2=9C=85 Here=E2=80=99s how to fix=
 it</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"250" data-end=3D"677">
<li data-start=3D"250" data-end=3D"490">
<p data-start=3D"253" data-end=3D"305"><strong data-start=3D"253" data-end=
=3D"302">Rename your files with the correct extensions</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"309" data-end=3D"490">
<li data-start=3D"309" data-end=3D"342">
<p data-start=3D"311" data-end=3D"342"><code data-start=3D"311" data-end=3D=
"321">index.md</code> =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"324" data-end=3D"340"=
><code data-start=3D"326" data-end=3D"338">index.html</code></strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"346" data-end=3D"380">
<p data-start=3D"348" data-end=3D"380"><code data-start=3D"348" data-end=3D=
"359">robots.md</code> =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"362" data-end=3D"378=
"><code data-start=3D"364" data-end=3D"376">robots.txt</code></strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"384" data-end=3D"420">
<p data-start=3D"386" data-end=3D"420"><code data-start=3D"386" data-end=3D=
"398">sitemap.md</code> =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"401" data-end=3D"41=
8"><code data-start=3D"403" data-end=3D"416">sitemap.xml</code></strong></p=
>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"424" data-end=3D"490">
<p data-start=3D"426" data-end=3D"490"><code data-start=3D"426" data-end=3D=
"437">README.md</code> =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"440" data-end=3D"456=
"><code data-start=3D"442" data-end=3D"454">README.txt</code></strong> (opt=
ional, just for your notes)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"492" data-end=3D"590">
<p data-start=3D"495" data-end=3D"590">Make sure your main file is <strong =
data-start=3D"523" data-end=3D"537">index.html</strong> (that=E2=80=99s wha=
t Vercel looks for as the entry point).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"592" data-end=3D"677">
<p data-start=3D"595" data-end=3D"677">Zip them into a folder again =E2=86=
=92 upload to Vercel (manual import or GitHub route).</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"679" data-end=3D"682">
<p data-start=3D"684" data-end=3D"705">=E2=9A=A1 Why this matters:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"706" data-end=3D"867">
<li data-start=3D"706" data-end=3D"761">
<p data-start=3D"708" data-end=3D"761"><code data-start=3D"708" data-end=3D=
"713">.md</code> =3D Markdown (for documentation, not websites).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"762" data-end=3D"803">
<p data-start=3D"764" data-end=3D"803"><code data-start=3D"764" data-end=3D=
"771">.html</code> =3D Webpage (browser-readable).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"804" data-end=3D"867">
<p data-start=3D"806" data-end=3D"867"><code data-start=3D"806" data-end=3D=
"812">.txt</code> and <code data-start=3D"817" data-end=3D"823">.xml</code>=
 =3D special formats used by search engines.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<p data-start=3D"845" data-end=3D"901">Make sure files are saved with the c=
orrect extensions:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"905" data-end=3D"974">
<li data-start=3D"905" data-end=3D"933">
<p data-start=3D"907" data-end=3D"933"><code data-start=3D"907" data-end=3D=
"919">index.html</code> (NOT <code data-start=3D"925" data-end=3D"930">.md<=
/code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"937" data-end=3D"953">
<p data-start=3D"939" data-end=3D"953"><code data-start=3D"939" data-end=3D=
"951">robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"957" data-end=3D"974">
<p data-start=3D"959" data-end=3D"974"><code data-start=3D"959" data-end=3D=
"972">sitemap.xml</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"976" data-end=3D"1048">
<p data-start=3D"979" data-end=3D"1048">Zip the files into a folder (e.g., =
<code data-start=3D"1014" data-end=3D"1044">devine-housing-solutions.zip</c=
ode>).</p>
</li>
</ol>

ry domain.</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"155" data-end=3D"188">=F0=9F=96=A5=EF=B8=8F Renaming File=
s on Windows</h1>
<ol data-start=3D"190" data-end=3D"789">
<li data-start=3D"190" data-end=3D"359">
<p data-start=3D"193" data-end=3D"263"><strong data-start=3D"193" data-end=
=3D"217">Show file extensions</strong> (important, otherwise Windows hides =
<code data-start=3D"254" data-end=3D"259">.md</code>):</p>
<ul data-start=3D"267" data-end=3D"359">
<li data-start=3D"267" data-end=3D"320">
<p data-start=3D"269" data-end=3D"320">Open any folder =E2=86=92 click <str=
ong data-start=3D"293" data-end=3D"301">View</strong> on the top menu.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"324" data-end=3D"359">
<p data-start=3D"326" data-end=3D"359">Check <strong data-start=3D"332" dat=
a-end=3D"356">File name extensions</strong>.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"361" data-end=3D"607">
<p data-start=3D"364" data-end=3D"387"><strong data-start=3D"364" data-end=
=3D"384">Rename each file</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"391" data-end=3D"607">
<li data-start=3D"391" data-end=3D"420">
<p data-start=3D"393" data-end=3D"420">Right-click =E2=86=92 <strong data-s=
tart=3D"407" data-end=3D"417">Rename</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"424" data-end=3D"607">
<p data-start=3D"426" data-end=3D"447">Change the endings:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"453" data-end=3D"607">
<li data-start=3D"453" data-end=3D"482">
<p data-start=3D"455" data-end=3D"482"><code data-start=3D"455" data-end=3D=
"465">index.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"468" data-end=3D"480">i=
ndex.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"488" data-end=3D"518">
<p data-start=3D"490" data-end=3D"518"><code data-start=3D"490" data-end=3D=
"501">robots.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"504" data-end=3D"516">=
robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"524" data-end=3D"556">

>sitemap.xml</code></p>

</li>

<li data-start=3D"609" data-end=3D"789">
<p data-start=3D"612" data-end=3D"646">Hit <strong data-start=3D"616" data-=
end=3D"625">Enter</strong> after each rename.</p>
<ul data-start=3D"650" data-end=3D"789">
<li data-start=3D"650" data-end=3D"744">
<p data-start=3D"652" data-end=3D"744">Windows may warn: <em data-start=3D"=
670" data-end=3D"742">=E2=80=9CIf you change a file name extension, the fil=
e might become unusable.=E2=80=9D</em></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"748" data-end=3D"789">
<p data-start=3D"750" data-end=3D"789">Click <strong data-start=3D"756" dat=
a-end=3D"763">Yes</strong> (this is what we want).</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"791" data-end=3D"794">
<h1 data-start=3D"796" data-end=3D"824">=F0=9F=8D=8F Renaming Files on Mac<=
/h1>
<ol data-start=3D"826" data-end=3D"1241">
<li data-start=3D"826" data-end=3D"847">
<p data-start=3D"829" data-end=3D"847">Open <strong data-start=3D"834" data=
-end=3D"844">Finder</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"848" data-end=3D"887">
<p data-start=3D"851" data-end=3D"887">Find your file (e.g., <code data-sta=
rt=3D"873" data-end=3D"883">index.md</code>).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"888" data-end=3D"945">
<p data-start=3D"891" data-end=3D"945"><strong data-start=3D"891" data-end=
=3D"915">Right-click =E2=86=92 Rename</strong> (or single-click the name).<=
/p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"946" data-end=3D"1121">
<p data-start=3D"949" data-end=3D"969">Change the ending:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"973" data-end=3D"1121">
<li data-start=3D"973" data-end=3D"1002">
<p data-start=3D"975" data-end=3D"1002"><code data-start=3D"975" data-end=
=3D"985">index.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"988" data-end=3D"100=
0">index.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1006" data-end=3D"1036">
<p data-start=3D"1008" data-end=3D"1036"><code data-start=3D"1008" data-end=
=3D"1019">robots.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"1022" data-end=3D"=
1034">robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1040" data-end=3D"1072">
<p data-start=3D"1042" data-end=3D"1072"><code data-start=3D"1042" data-end=
=3D"1054">sitemap.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"1057" data-end=3D=
"1070">sitemap.xml</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1076" data-end=3D"1121">
<p data-start=3D"1078" data-end=3D"1121"><code data-start=3D"1078" data-end=
=3D"1089">README.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"1092" data-end=3D"=
1119">README-Vercel-GoDaddy.txt</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1122" data-end=3D"1241">
<p data-start=3D"1125" data-end=3D"1142">Hit <strong data-start=3D"1129" da=
ta-end=3D"1139">Return</strong>.</p>
<ul data-start=3D"1146" data-end=3D"1241">
<li data-start=3D"1146" data-end=3D"1241">
<p data-start=3D"1148" data-end=3D"1241">If Mac warns about changing the ex=
tension, confirm with <strong data-start=3D"1204" data-end=3D"1217">Use .ht=
ml</strong> (or <code data-start=3D"1222" data-end=3D"1228">.txt</code> / <=
code data-start=3D"1231" data-end=3D"1237">.xml</code>).</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

<h1 data-start=3D"205" data-end=3D"252">Part 0 =E2=80=94 Get your files rea=
dy (correct names)</h1>
<p data-start=3D"254" data-end=3D"295">You need exactly <strong data-start=
=3D"271" data-end=3D"280">three</strong> website files:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"297" data-end=3D"411">
<li data-start=3D"297" data-end=3D"313">
<p data-start=3D"299" data-end=3D"313"><code data-start=3D"299" data-end=3D=
"311">index.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"314" data-end=3D"330">
<p data-start=3D"316" data-end=3D"330"><code data-start=3D"316" data-end=3D=
"328">robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"331" data-end=3D"411">
<p data-start=3D"333" data-end=3D"411"><code data-start=3D"333" data-end=3D=
"346">sitemap.xml</code><br data-start=3D"346" data-end=3D"349">
(Plus the optional <code data-start=3D"368" data-end=3D"395">README-Vercel-=
GoDaddy.txt</code> you asked for.)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-start=3D"413" data-end=3D"455">If your files currently end with <c=
ode data-start=3D"450" data-end=3D"455">.md</code></h3>
<p data-start=3D"456" data-end=3D"472"><strong data-start=3D"456" data-end=
=3D"471">Rename them</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"474" data-end=3D"567">
<li data-start=3D"474" data-end=3D"503">
<p data-start=3D"476" data-end=3D"503"><code data-start=3D"476" data-end=3D=
"486">index.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"489" data-end=3D"501">i=
ndex.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"504" data-end=3D"534">
<p data-start=3D"506" data-end=3D"534"><code data-start=3D"506" data-end=3D=
"517">robots.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"520" data-end=3D"532">=
robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"535" data-end=3D"567">
<p data-start=3D"537" data-end=3D"567"><code data-start=3D"537" data-end=3D=
"549">sitemap.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-start=3D"552" data-end=3D"565"=
>sitemap.xml</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 data-start=3D"569" data-end=3D"599">Windows (rename properly)</h4>
<ol data-start=3D"600" data-end=3D"833">
<li data-start=3D"600" data-end=3D"680">
<p data-start=3D"603" data-end=3D"680">Open your folder. Click <strong data=
-start=3D"627" data-end=3D"635">View</strong> =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=
=3D"638" data-end=3D"662">File name extensions</strong> (turn this ON).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"681" data-end=3D"768">
<p data-start=3D"684" data-end=3D"768">Right=E2=80=91click each file =E2=86=
=92 <strong data-start=3D"708" data-end=3D"718">Rename</strong> =E2=86=92 c=
hange the ending to <code data-start=3D"742" data-end=3D"749">.html</code>,=
 <code data-start=3D"751" data-end=3D"757">.txt</code>, <code data-start=3D=
"759" data-end=3D"765">.xml</code>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"769" data-end=3D"833">
<p data-start=3D"772" data-end=3D"833">If Windows warns about changing the =
extension, click <strong data-start=3D"825" data-end=3D"832">Yes</strong>.<=
/p>
</li>
</ol>
<h4 data-start=3D"835" data-end=3D"861">Mac (rename properly)</h4>
<ol data-start=3D"862" data-end=3D"1026">
<li data-start=3D"862" data-end=3D"971">
<p data-start=3D"865" data-end=3D"971">In <strong data-start=3D"868" data-e=
nd=3D"878">Finder</strong>, click once on the file name, press <strong data=
-start=3D"915" data-end=3D"925">Return</strong>, change the ending (e.g., <=
code data-start=3D"952" data-end=3D"957">.md</code> =E2=86=92 <code data-st=
art=3D"960" data-end=3D"967">.html</code>).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"972" data-end=3D"1026">
<p data-start=3D"975" data-end=3D"1026">If asked, click <strong data-start=
=3D"991" data-end=3D"1004">Use .html</strong> (or <code data-start=3D"1009"=
 data-end=3D"1015">.txt</code> / <code data-start=3D"1018" data-end=3D"1024=
">.xml</code>).</p>
</li>
</ol>

<li data-start=3D"1542" data-end=3D"1610">

nd=3D"1555">Do NOT</strong> check =E2=80=9CAdd a README=E2=80=9D (we=E2=80=
=99ll upload files ourselves).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1611" data-end=3D"1642">
<p data-start=3D"1614" data-end=3D"1642">Click <strong data-start=3D"1620" =
data-end=3D"1641">Create repository</strong>.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"1644" data-end=3D"1647">
<h1 data-start=3D"1649" data-end=3D"1687">Part 3 =E2=80=94 Upload your file=
s to GitHub</h1>
<ol data-start=3D"1689" data-end=3D"2015">
<li data-start=3D"1689" data-end=3D"1755">
<p data-start=3D"1692" data-end=3D"1755">On your new repo page, click <stro=
ng data-start=3D"1721" data-end=3D"1733">Add file</strong> =E2=86=92 <stron=
g data-start=3D"1736" data-end=3D"1752">Upload files</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1756" data-end=3D"1903">
<p data-start=3D"1759" data-end=3D"1790">Drag in your <strong data-start=3D=
"1772" data-end=3D"1787">three files</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"1794" data-end=3D"1903">
<li data-start=3D"1794" data-end=3D"1810">
<p data-start=3D"1796" data-end=3D"1810"><code data-start=3D"1796" data-end=
=3D"1808">index.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1814" data-end=3D"1830">
<p data-start=3D"1816" data-end=3D"1830"><code data-start=3D"1816" data-end=
=3D"1828">robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1834" data-end=3D"1903">
<p data-start=3D"1836" data-end=3D"1903"><code data-start=3D"1836" data-end=
=3D"1849">sitemap.xml</code><br data-start=3D"1849" data-end=3D"1852">
(And <code data-start=3D"1860" data-end=3D"1887">README-Vercel-GoDaddy.txt<=
/code> if you like.)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1904" data-end=3D"1961">
<p data-start=3D"1907" data-end=3D"1961">Scroll down =E2=86=92 <strong data=
-start=3D"1921" data-end=3D"1939">Commit changes</strong> (big green button=
).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1962" data-end=3D"2015">
<p data-start=3D"1965" data-end=3D"2015">You should now <strong data-start=
=3D"1980" data-end=3D"2004">see the files listed</strong> in GitHub.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start=3D"2017" data-end=3D"2206"><strong data-start=3D"2017" data-e=
nd=3D"2045">Common mistake to avoid:</strong><br data-start=3D"2045" data-e=
nd=3D"2048">
If you upload a <strong data-start=3D"2064" data-end=3D"2074">folder</stron=
g>, GitHub might nest files one level deep. Make sure the files appear <str=
ong data-start=3D"2143" data-end=3D"2178">directly in the repository root</=
strong>, not inside another folder.</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"3016" data-end=3D"3083">Part 5 =E2=80=94 Connect your GoD=

<ol data-start=3D"3117" data-end=3D"3278">

<p data-start=3D"3120" data-end=3D"3176">In Vercel =E2=86=92 your project =
=E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"3147" data-end=3D"3159">Settings</strong> =
=E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"3162" data-end=3D"3173">Domains</strong>.</=

<p data-start=3D"3757" data-end=3D"3770">Host: <code data-start=3D"3763" da=
ta-end=3D"3768">www</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"3771" data-end=3D"3808">
<p data-start=3D"3773" data-end=3D"3808">Points to: <code data-start=3D"378=
4" data-end=3D"3806">cname.vercel-dns.com</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"3809" data-end=3D"3829">
<p data-start=3D"3811" data-end=3D"3829">TTL: leave default</p>
</li>
</ul>
<ol start=3D"4" data-start=3D"3831" data-end=3D"3867">

data-end=3D"3848">Save</strong> after each record.</p>
</li>

<h3 data-start=3D"3869" data-end=3D"3892">C) Verify in Vercel</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"3893" data-end=3D"4167">
<li data-start=3D"3893" data-end=3D"3937">
<p data-start=3D"3896" data-end=3D"3937">Go back to the Vercel <strong data=
-start=3D"3918" data-end=3D"3929">Domains</strong> page.</p>
</li>

data-end=3D"3957">Verify</strong>.</p>

ally adds <strong data-start=3D"4008" data-end=3D"4017">HTTPS</strong>.</p>
</li>

3" data-end=3D"4051">Primary Domain</strong> (recommended: <code data-start=
=3D"4066" data-end=3D"4098">www.devinehousingsolutions.com</code>).</p>

the other version to the primary.</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"4174" data-end=3D"4223">Part 6 =E2=80=94 Quick SEO &amp; =
content checks (2 minutes)</h1>
<ol data-start=3D"4225" data-end=3D"4681">

<p data-start=3D"4228" data-end=3D"4264">Open your site on your new domain.=
</p>
</li>

=3D"4354">https://YOURDOMAIN.com/robots.txt</code></p>

=3D"4398">https://YOURDOMAIN.com/sitemap.xml</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>

ders:</p>

op), update <code data-start=3D"4542" data-end=3D"4557">streetAddress</code=
>, <code data-start=3D"4559" data-end=3D"4571">postalCode</code>, <code dat=
a-start=3D"4573" data-end=3D"4584">telephone</code>.</p>
</li>
</ul>

 and submit your <code data-start=3D"4666" data-end=3D"4680">/sitemap.xml</=
code>.</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"4688" data-end=3D"4738">Part 7 =E2=80=94 How to make upda=
tes later (no mistakes)</h1>
<ul data-start=3D"4740" data-end=3D"5034">
<li data-start=3D"4740" data-end=3D"4791">
<p data-start=3D"4742" data-end=3D"4791"><strong data-start=3D"4742" data-e=
nd=3D"4758">Edit locally</strong> (change text in <code data-start=3D"4775"=
 data-end=3D"4787">index.html</code>).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"4792" data-end=3D"4896">
<p data-start=3D"4794" data-end=3D"4896">In GitHub, open the file =E2=86=92=
 click the <strong data-start=3D"4831" data-end=3D"4846">pencil icon</stron=
g> =E2=86=92 paste your updated code =E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"4875" =
data-end=3D"4893">Commit changes</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"4897" data-end=3D"4966">
<p data-start=3D"4899" data-end=3D"4966">Vercel <strong data-start=3D"4906"=
 data-end=3D"4922">auto=E2=80=91deploys</strong> and updates your site in a=
 minute or two.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"4967" data-end=3D"5034">
<p data-start=3D"4969" data-end=3D"5034">Refresh your site (use <strong dat=
a-start=3D"4992" data-end=3D"5016">Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + R</strong> to hard=E2=
=80=91refresh).</p>
</li>

<hr data-start=3D"5036" data-end=3D"5039">
<h2 data-start=3D"5041" data-end=3D"5072">Common problems &amp; easy fixes<=
/h2>
<ul data-start=3D"5074" data-end=3D"5623">
<li data-start=3D"5074" data-end=3D"5182">
<p data-start=3D"5076" data-end=3D"5182"><strong data-start=3D"5076" data-e=
nd=3D"5117">Site shows a directory listing or 404</strong> =E2=86=92 Your m=
ain file must be exactly <code data-start=3D"5151" data-end=3D"5163">index.=
html</code> (all lowercase).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5183" data-end=3D"5261">
<p data-start=3D"5185" data-end=3D"5261"><strong data-start=3D"5185" data-e=
nd=3D"5211">Changes aren=E2=80=99t showing</strong> =E2=86=92 Hard=E2=80=91=
refresh the page (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + R).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5262" data-end=3D"5420">
<p data-start=3D"5264" data-end=3D"5420"><strong data-start=3D"5264" data-e=
nd=3D"5285">DNS not verifying</strong> =E2=86=92 In GoDaddy, make sure you =
don=E2=80=99t have <em data-start=3D"5325" data-end=3D"5332">other</em> A r=
ecords for <code data-start=3D"5347" data-end=3D"5350">@</code> or <em data=
-start=3D"5354" data-end=3D"5361">other</em> CNAMEs for <code data-start=3D=
"5373" data-end=3D"5378">www</code>. Keep only the two records shown above.=
</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5421" data-end=3D"5553">
<p data-start=3D"5423" data-end=3D"5553"><strong data-start=3D"5423" data-e=
nd=3D"5456">Files uploaded but site blank</strong> =E2=86=92 Ensure <code d=
ata-start=3D"5466" data-end=3D"5478">index.html</code> content is real HTML=
 (starts with <code data-start=3D"5513" data-end=3D"5530">&lt;!DOCTYPE html=
&gt;</code> etc.), not Markdown.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5554" data-end=3D"5623">
<p data-start=3D"5556" data-end=3D"5623"><strong data-start=3D"5556" data-e=
nd=3D"5588">Accidentally saved as <code data-start=3D"5580" data-end=3D"558=
6">.txt</code></strong> =E2=86=92 Rename to <code data-start=3D"5601" data-=
end=3D"5608">.html</code> and try again.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"5625" data-end=3D"5628">
<h2 data-start=3D"5630" data-end=3D"5695">(Optional) Make sure your file sa=
ved as real <code data-start=3D"5678" data-end=3D"5685">.html</code> (Windo=
ws)</h2>
<p data-start=3D"5697" data-end=3D"5726">When saving from <strong data-star=
t=3D"5714" data-end=3D"5725">Notepad</strong>:</p>
<ol data-start=3D"5727" data-end=3D"5857">
<li data-start=3D"5727" data-end=3D"5747">
<p data-start=3D"5730" data-end=3D"5747">File =E2=86=92 Save As=E2=80=A6</p=
>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5748" data-end=3D"5780">
<p data-start=3D"5751" data-end=3D"5780"><strong data-start=3D"5751" data-e=
nd=3D"5765">File name:</strong> <code data-start=3D"5766" data-end=3D"5778"=
>index.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5781" data-end=3D"5823">
<p data-start=3D"5784" data-end=3D"5823"><strong data-start=3D"5784" data-e=
nd=3D"5801">Save as type:</strong> <strong data-start=3D"5802" data-end=3D"=
5821">All Files (<em data-start=3D"5815" data-end=3D"5818">.</em>)</strong>=
</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5824" data-end=3D"5848">
<p data-start=3D"5827" data-end=3D"5848"><strong data-start=3D"5827" data-e=
nd=3D"5840">Encoding:</strong> UTF=E2=80=918</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"5849" data-end=3D"5857">
<p data-start=3D"5852" data-end=3D"5857">Save.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start=3D"5859" data-end=3D"5948">(If you pick =E2=80=9CText Documen=
ts (.txt)=E2=80=9D, Windows will sneak <code data-start=3D"5916" data-end=
=3D"5922">.txt</code> onto the end=E2=80=94avoid that.)</p>

<h3 data-start=3D"750" data-end=3D"774">C) Upload your files</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"775" data-end=3D"1098">
<li data-start=3D"775" data-end=3D"838">
<p data-start=3D"778" data-end=3D"838">On your new repo page =E2=86=92 clic=
k <strong data-start=3D"808" data-end=3D"835">Add file =E2=86=92 Upload fil=
es</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"839" data-end=3D"977">
<p data-start=3D"842" data-end=3D"864">Drag in these files:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"868" data-end=3D"977">
<li data-start=3D"868" data-end=3D"884">
<p data-start=3D"870" data-end=3D"884"><code data-start=3D"870" data-end=3D=
"882">index.html</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"888" data-end=3D"904">
<p data-start=3D"890" data-end=3D"904"><code data-start=3D"890" data-end=3D=
"902">robots.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"908" data-end=3D"977">
<p data-start=3D"910" data-end=3D"977"><code data-start=3D"910" data-end=3D=
"923">sitemap.xml</code><br data-start=3D"923" data-end=3D"926">
(and <code data-start=3D"934" data-end=3D"961">README-Vercel-GoDaddy.txt</c=
ode> if you want).</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"978" data-end=3D"1041">
<p data-start=3D"981" data-end=3D"1041">Scroll down =E2=86=92 click the <st=
rong data-start=3D"1005" data-end=3D"1023">Commit changes</strong> (green b=
utton).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1042" data-end=3D"1098">
<p data-start=3D"1045" data-end=3D"1098">You should now see all your files =
listed in the repo.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start=3D"1100" data-end=3D"1195">=E2=9C=85 Important: Make sure you=
r main file is called exactly <code data-start=3D"1156" data-end=3D"1168">i=
ndex.html</code> (not <code data-start=3D"1174" data-end=3D"1179">.md</code=
>, not <code data-start=3D"1185" data-end=3D"1191">.txt</code>).</p>

<h1 data-start=3D"1202" data-end=3D"1231">2. Connect GitHub to Vercel</h1>
<h3 data-start=3D"1233" data-end=3D"1258">A) Sign up for Vercel</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"1259" data-end=3D"1441">
<li data-start=3D"1259" data-end=3D"1311">
<p data-start=3D"1262" data-end=3D"1311">Go to <a data-start=3D"1268" data-=
end=3D"1308" rel=3D"noopener" target=3D"_new" class=3D"decorated-link curso=
r-pointer">https://vercel.com<span aria-hidden=3D"true" class=3D"ms-0.5 inl=
ine-block align-middle leading-none"><svg width=3D"20" height=3D"20" viewBo=
x=3D"0 0 20 20" fill=3D"currentColor" xmlns=3D"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" =
data-rtl-flip=3D"" class=3D"block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-current stro=
ke-[0.75]"><path d=3D"M14.3349 13.3301V6.60645L5.47065 15.4707C5.21095 15.7=
304 4.78895 15.7304 4.52925 15.4707C4.26955 15.211 4.26955 14.789 4.52925 1=
4.5293L13.3935 5.66504H6.66011C6.29284 5.66504 5.99507 5.36727 5.99507 5C5.=
99507 4.63273 6.29284 4.33496 6.66011 4.33496H14.9999L15.1337 4.34863C15.43=
69 4.41057 15.665 4.67857 15.665 5V13.3301C15.6649 13.6973 15.3672 13.9951 =
14.9999 13.9951C14.6327 13.9951 14.335 13.6973 14.3349 13.3301Z"></path></s=
vg></span></a>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1312" data-end=3D"1348">
<p data-start=3D"1315" data-end=3D"1348">Click <strong data-start=3D"1321" =
data-end=3D"1345">Continue with GitHub</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1349" data-end=3D"1441">
<p data-start=3D"1352" data-end=3D"1441">Authorize Vercel to access your Gi=
tHub (it just needs permission to deploy your repos).</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start=3D"1443" data-end=3D"1446">
<h3 data-start=3D"1448" data-end=3D"1474">B) Import your project</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"1475" data-end=3D"1668">
<li data-start=3D"1475" data-end=3D"1524">
<p data-start=3D"1478" data-end=3D"1524">In Vercel dashboard =E2=86=92 <str=
ong data-start=3D"1500" data-end=3D"1521">Add New =E2=86=92 Project</strong=
>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1525" data-end=3D"1563">
<p data-start=3D"1528" data-end=3D"1563">Choose <strong data-start=3D"1535"=
 data-end=3D"1560">Import Git Repository</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1564" data-end=3D"1628">
<p data-start=3D"1567" data-end=3D"1628">Select <code data-start=3D"1574" d=
ata-end=3D"1600">devine-housing-solutions</code> (the repo you just made).<=
/p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1629" data-end=3D"1668">
<p data-start=3D"1632" data-end=3D"1668">Leave defaults =E2=86=92 click <st=
rong data-start=3D"1655" data-end=3D"1665">Deploy</strong>.</p>
</li>
</ol>

<h1 data-start=3D"1885" data-end=3D"1949">3. Delete your first upload in Ve=
rcel (the one you don=E2=80=99t want)</h1>
<p data-start=3D"1951" data-end=3D"2034">If you uploaded files manually bef=
ore, Vercel may have created a project already.</p>
<h3 data-start=3D"2036" data-end=3D"2053">To delete it:</h3>
<ol data-start=3D"2054" data-end=3D"2360">
<li data-start=3D"2054" data-end=3D"2126">
<p data-start=3D"2057" data-end=3D"2126">Go to <a data-start=3D"2063" data-=
end=3D"2123" rel=3D"noopener" target=3D"_new" class=3D"decorated-link curso=
r-pointer">https://vercel.com/dashboard<span aria-hidden=3D"true" class=3D"=
ms-0.5 inline-block align-middle leading-none"><svg width=3D"20" height=3D"=
20" viewBox=3D"0 0 20 20" fill=3D"currentColor" xmlns=3D"http://www.w3.org/=
2000/svg" data-rtl-flip=3D"" class=3D"block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-cu=
rrent stroke-[0.75]"><path d=3D"M14.3349 13.3301V6.60645L5.47065 15.4707C5.=

</path></svg></span></a>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"2127" data-end=3D"2165">
<p data-start=3D"2130" data-end=3D"2165">Find the old project in the list.<=
/p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"2166" data-end=3D"2228">
<p data-start=3D"2169" data-end=3D"2228">Click the <strong data-start=3D"21=
79" data-end=3D"2199">three dots (=C2=B7=C2=B7=C2=B7)</strong> next to it =
=E2=86=92 <strong data-start=3D"2213" data-end=3D"2225">Settings</strong>.<=
/p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"2229" data-end=3D"2294">
<p data-start=3D"2232" data-end=3D"2294">Scroll down =E2=86=92 at the very =
bottom you=E2=80=99ll see <strong data-start=3D"2276" data-end=3D"2291">Dan=
ger Zone</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"2295" data-end=3D"2360">
<p data-start=3D"2298" data-end=3D"2360">Click <strong data-start=3D"2304" =
data-end=3D"2322">Delete Project</strong> =E2=86=92 type the project name t=
o confirm.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start=3D"2362" data-end=3D"2405">That project and its URL will be r=
emoved.</p>
<hr data-start=3D"2407" data-end=3D"2410">
<p data-start=3D"2412" data-end=3D"2503">=E2=9C=85 After that, only your Gi=
tHub-connected project will remain, and updates are super easy:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"2504" data-end=3D"2578">
<li data-start=3D"2504" data-end=3D"2578">
<p data-start=3D"2506" data-end=3D"2578">Change a file in GitHub =E2=86=92 =
Commit =E2=86=92 Vercel auto-updates your live site.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<hr data-start=3D"1567" data-end=3D"1570">
<h1 data-start=3D"1572" data-end=3D"1602">=F0=9F=94=91 Which one should you=
 use?</h1>
<ul data-start=3D"1604" data-end=3D"1819">
<li data-start=3D"1604" data-end=3D"1706">
<p data-start=3D"1606" data-end=3D"1706"><strong data-start=3D"1606" data-e=
nd=3D"1622">GitHub Pages</strong> =E2=86=92 fastest, simplest, free forever=
. Great if you don=E2=80=99t mind a longer URL at first.</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1707" data-end=3D"1819">
<p data-start=3D"1709" data-end=3D"1819"><strong data-start=3D"1709" data-e=
nd=3D"1719">Vercel</strong> =E2=86=92 more professional, easier domain setu=
p, free SSL, and auto-updates whenever you push to GitHub.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start=3D"1821" data-end=3D"1824">
<p data-start=3D"1826" data-end=3D"1848">=E2=9C=85 My recommendation:</p>
<ul data-start=3D"1849" data-end=3D"2018">
<li data-start=3D"1849" data-end=3D"1922">
<p data-start=3D"1851" data-end=3D"1922">Start with <strong data-start=3D"1=
862" data-end=3D"1872">Vercel</strong> (looks more polished, works well wit=
h GoDaddy).</p>
</li>
<li data-start=3D"1923" data-end=3D"2018">
<p data-start=3D"1925" data-end=3D"2018">Keep GitHub Pages as a backup opti=
on =E2=80=94 it=E2=80=99s always free and live as soon as you turn it on.</=
p>
</li>
</ul>

<h1 data-start=3D"2350" data-end=3D"2381">=E2=9A=A1 Which one should you us=
e?</h1>

<p data-start=3D"2385" data-end=3D"2475"><strong data-start=3D"2385" data-e=
nd=3D"2401">GitHub Pages</strong> =E2=86=92 Free &amp; reliable, but setup =
is a bit more manual (multiple A records).</p>

nd=3D"2488">Vercel</strong> =E2=86=92 Easier, only 2 DNS changes, more prof=
essional dashboard, automatic SSL.</p>
</li>

ong data-start=3D"2588" data-end=3D"2608">Vercel + GoDaddy</strong> for the=
 easiest path. Keep GitHub Pages enabled as a backup (it costs nothing).</p=
